subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto God that thou hast succeeded in turning unto Him in these days wherein the mystics, divines, men of learning and princes of the earth have turned away from the Truth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله موفق شدی بر اقبال در ایامیکه عرفا و علما و ادبا و امرای ارض از حق
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
